forecast.name: Overnight
forecast.detailedForecast: Partly cloudy, with a low around 57. Northwest wind around 3 mph.

forecast.name: Tuesday
forecast.detailedForecast: Mostly sunny, with a high near 83. West wind 2 to 9 mph.

weather_report:
As dawn breaks over Boston, the horizon glows softly, hinting at the promise of a splendid day ahead. The air is cool, kissed by a gentle breeze that carries the last whispers of a night now receding into memory. The forecast hints at a transition from the tranquility of the pre-dawn hours to the warmth of a bright afternoon, where the sun will rise high, banishing any remnant whispers of fog that may linger in the early hours. By midday, the sky is expected to fully unfurl its bright blues, beckoning the city’s inhabitants to step outside and revel in the gentle embrace of a late spring day.

Today invites easy attire; light fabrics that allow the skin to breathe will serve well, complemented by perhaps a light sweater for those crisp moments just after sunrise. As the sun climbs higher, it will weave warmth into the air, making it a delightful time for those wandering through the Emerald Necklace or meandering along the Charles River. It’s a day to sip coffee on a sunlit patio, lose oneself in a well-loved book, or simply watch the world pass by. With the pleasant conditions, one might find joy in a leisurely stroll through the historic streets or an al fresco lunch at one of the many charming cafés. Time moves slowly under the generous sun, inviting all to linger a while longer, to soak in the joy of the day.
